checksum.algorithm: sha256 over sorted unique normalized text hashes

contamination_leakage_notes: Exact hash leakage checks pass across train, validation, and test splits.
dedup_strategy: Exact normalized text SHA-256 dedup before split.
language_mix: 2 English smoke documents and 2 Japanese smoke documents.

leakage_check.method: exact normalized text sha256 intersection between train and held-out splits

license: Source registry metadata is preserved per processed record; smoke text is repo-authored.
preprocessing_command: uv run python -m corpus.clean --config configs/corpus_v01.yaml --smoke --output data/processed/corpus_v01_smoke
split_method: PHASE-10C document-level train/validation/test split from docs/corpus_v01_dataset_manifest.json.
tokenized_metadata_format: JSON sidecar with token file paths, dtype, sha256, tokenizer id, and split names
url_or_local_note: Ignored PHASE-10B smoke corpus generated locally by corpus.clean.
